findings.description: Slide text is duplicated within the layout.
findings.evidence: HTML page 1 displays a visual rendering of the title slide, followed immediately by a plain HTML text duplication of the same content.

findings.description: Reading order is broken by out-of-sequence table placement.
findings.evidence: HTML page 2 renders the 'Number of TGC stocked' table from PDF page 3 before the main content of slide 3.
PDF page 3 displays two tables side-by-side; HTML renders them as separate, sequential tables.
The 'Number of TGC stocked' table appears on HTML page 5 despite already being rendered on HTML page 2.

findings.description: Two-column layout collapsed to single column.
findings.evidence: PDF page 5 displays text on the left and a map on the right; HTML page 6 stacks the text vertically above the map.
PDF page 9 displays two sonar images side-by-side; HTML renders them stacked vertically across pages 10 and 11.
PDF page 10 displays two maps side-by-side; HTML page 11 renders them stacked vertically.
